privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Chinook sample database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database, containing 59 customers with personal identifiable information including names (e.g., Luís Gonçalves), email addresses, phone/fax numbers, company affiliations, and addresses across 24 countries. The database specifically contains 10 customers with company information. The task requires anonymizing these customer PII fields according to specified rules while preserving non-PII fields and referential integrity.
